1. [completed] [mcp-executor] Inspect the IPL schema for matches, match_teams, innings, deliveries, and teams.
2. [completed] [mcp-executor] Confirm how IPL 2025 is encoded in the matches data and whether there are any season/date filters needed.
3. [pending] [mcp-executor] Compute a concrete team-balance metric for IPL 2025 from the available data.
4. [pending] [tool-executor] Generate a clear, engaging data blog post with narrative writing, charts, and tables. 5. [pending] [tool-executor] Print the path of the generated HTML file.
